broken: href="#part4c" — no element with id="part4c" exists
showTab('details') — no tab with id 'details' or 'tab-details' exists (3 occurrences)
internal_anchors.details: 132 internal links checked. 1 broken anchor (#part4c in selftest tab, references Part 4.6 code analysis section). showTab('overview') is valid (overview tab exists with class='tab-content active'). showTab('details') is called 3 times in WIN detail text but no 'details' tab exists — these links navigate to WIN detail sections using a nonexistent tab ID. No sectionNav calls found — the site may use a different navigation pattern.

tab_structure.details: 10 tabs found (including overview with 'active' class). No duplicate IDs. All tab buttons reference valid tab IDs.

broken.note: GFZ CHAMP mission page — mission ended, page may have been reorganized
NASA GRACE mission page — likely URL restructuring
LPI Apollo 11 LRR page — site restructured
CUORE experiment site — SSL cert expired
CHIME FRB site — domain not resolving

external_links.details: 46 non-citation links checked. 39 OK, 5 broken, 2 blocked (ScienceDirect 403, expected for automated requests). Broken links are mostly institutional site restructuring, not content removal.

data_prose_consistency.details: All 67 WINs present in HTML. Verdict counts match. Build output matches source data exactly.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 67 WINs have matching headings in the HTML. All detail_group references are internally consistent.

build_reproducibility.details: Running 'node build.js html' produces identical output to the published docs/index.html. No build drift detected.

issues_found.description: showTab('details') called 3 times in WIN detail text but no 'details' tab exists. These links (in WINs about Schumann resonance, eclipse nulls, and equation of time) navigate to nonexistent tab, making them dead links.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Replace showTab('details') with showTab('wins') in the relevant wins.json detail_evidence fields, since WIN detail sections live in the 'wins' tab.

issues_found.description: href="#part4c" in selftest tab references nonexistent anchor. This link in the blockchain timestamping discussion should point to the Part 4.6 code analysis section.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Add id="part4c" to the Part 4.6 heading in generate-html.js, or update the href to match the existing heading ID for that section.

issues_found.description: 5 external data source links broken: GFZ CHAMP (404), NASA GRACE (404), LPI Apollo 11 LRR (404), CUORE (expired SSL), CHIME FRB (DNS failure). All are institutional site restructurings, not content removals.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Find current URLs: CHAMP→GFZ Potsdam archive; GRACE→grace.jpl.nasa.gov (already linked elsewhere); Apollo LRR→NASA or ILRS; CUORE→check if cert renews; CHIME→check chime-experiment.ca or chimefrb.ca

summary: Site structure is mostly sound — build is reproducible, all 67 WINs are present and consistent with wins.json, verdict counts match, and no build drift detected. Two major issues found: (1) showTab('details') is called 3 times in WIN detail text but no 'details' tab exists, making those internal navigation links dead; (2) href='#part4c' references a nonexistent anchor for the Part 4.6 section. Five external data source links are broken due to institutional site restructuring. Code analysis tags show 0/67 reviewed — the curmudgeon review pipeline appears to not have started or tags were reset.
